task_completion.description: Create a new IFC project named 'Hartwell Foundation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Bonsai/BlenderBIM Project setup panel or Outliner showing the root project node named 'Hartwell Foundation' (or containing 'Hartwell').

task_completion.description: Establish a spatial hierarchy including Project, Site, Building, and a Storey named 'Foundation Level'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Outliner or Spatial Manager panel displaying the hierarchy tree: Project -> Site -> Building -> Storey named 'Foundation Level'.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Foundation Level' storey to a negative elevation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Object properties or Spatial Manager showing the Z elevation value for 'Foundation Level' is less than 0 (e.g., -1.0m).

task_completion.description: Model five IfcFooting elements (four pad footings and one strip footing) on the Foundation Level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D viewport showing four pad footings (typically isolated rectangular blocks) and one strip footing (a long continuous block), or the Outliner listing five IfcFooting elements under the 'Foundation Level' hierarchy.

task_completion.description: Create and assign an IFC material with 'Concrete' in its name to at least one footing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Material properties tab in Blender/Bonsai showing a material containing the word 'Concrete' assigned to a selected IfcFooting element.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an IFC file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender's 'Export IFC' or 'Save Project' dialog, or a terminal window confirming the file is saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/foundation_layout.ifc'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Bonsai/BlenderBIM GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's interface, menus, and 3D viewport, rather than just running a Python script in a terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent actually modeled the elements in the 3D space.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows the footings being placed and manipulated visually, not just text editing a raw .ifc file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent created a new project from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the initial 'Create Project' step in Bonsai, rather than opening an already completed or partially completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/BIMProjects/foundation_layout.ifc'. The project name must contain the keyword 'Hartwell'. The minimum number of footings is 5 (specifically 4 pad footings and 1 strip footing). The material assigned to at least one footing must contain the keyword 'Concrete'.
